blocks.text: UCL Night of Reckoning: Monaco, Benfica and Dortmund Decide Their Fates

Three Champions League ties reach their verdict on Wednesday. PSG's slender 3-2 lead over Monaco is far from safe — one away goal flips the French derby. Real Madrid sweat against Benfica. Dortmund look set to coast.
🎮 100 Thieves vs MANA — Norwegian star rain (Håvard Nygaard) flies the flag in DraculaN S5
